scripts.plan:sample: rm -rf .tmp/plans && node scripts/generate-business-authority-plans.mjs --inventory fixtures/inventory.sample.json --output .tmp/plans --mode scaffold && node scripts/generate-business-authority-plans.mjs --inventory fixtures/inventory.sample.json --output .tmp/plans --mode validate
scripts.controller:fixture: rm -rf .tmp/controller && node scripts/generate-business-authority-plans.mjs --inventory fixtures/inventory.sample.json --output .tmp/controller/plans --mode scaffold && node scripts/controller/reconcile.mjs --inventory fixtures/inventory.sample.json --plans-root .tmp/controller/plans --source-root . --config fixtures/controller.config.sample.json --output .tmp/controller/state --reports .tmp/controller/reports --exceptions .tmp/controller/exceptions --mode fixture && node scripts/controller/validate.mjs --state .tmp/controller/state/controller-state.json
scripts.check:portfolio: pnpm validate && pnpm plan:sample && pnpm execute:portfolio && pnpm validate:execution && pnpm typecheck
scripts.check:controller: pnpm validate && pnpm controller:fixture && pnpm build && pnpm typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm validate && pnpm plan:sample && pnpm build && pnpm typecheck
